character.name: RelicCaster
character.prompt: tall thin corrupted sorcerer holding a broken ancient relic artifact that pulses blue-purple rift energy, robes tattered and floating at edges, one arm raised channeling shield energy from relic, lean fragile silhouette with clear distinct outline, pale grey and faded purple robe palette with strong rift energy glow emanating from relic artifact, fractured dark fantasy support enemy, RIMA universe
